results.title: 2027: APM Presidential Candidate, Seyi Makinde, Picks Running Mate
results.description: The presidential candidate of the Allied Peoples Movement (APM), Governor Seyi Makinde of Oyo State has picked his running mate. Naija News gathered that... The post 2027: APM Presidential Candidate, Seyi Makinde, Picks Running Mate appeared first on Naija News .

results.title: Public health minister urges review into starting age for bowel cancer screening
results.description: Scotland’s public health minister has written to the UK National Screening Committee (NSC) to urge it to review the recommended starting age for bowel cancer screening.

results.title: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Era of One-Sided Deals is Over
results.description: Iran’s chief negotiator and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf says the era of one-sided deals is over, warning that parties must honor their commitments or face the consequences of failing to do so. In a post on X on Sunday, Ghalibaf wrote, “The era of one-sided deals is OVER. We told you: keep your word ...

results.title: Indigenous rights activist Pranab Doley arrested in Guwahati over Bokakhat case
results.description: Police from Bokakhat are travelling to Guwahati to formally assume custody after the activist's detention by Dispur Police

results.title: [Interview] Ukrainian military expert: Russian air defence is in a catastrophic state – and the pressure will keep growing
results.description: Ukraine’s war planners see a paradoxical path ahead: even as battles grind on around Donbas, the real turning point may come from collapsing Russian logistics deep behind the front.
